text: I feel the weight of responsibility pressing upon me, as if the words spoken here echo an urgent collective struggle. The environment, with its sparse gathering and displays of innovation, underscores a sense of shared challenge and the necessity of unity. Yet, within this modern and designed space, there is a flicker of hope—perhaps through collaboration and new thinking, we can meet the needs we face. I am both anxious and inspired, aware that survival hinges not only on scarcity, but also on solidarity and creativity.
